title: iris × pseudopumilioides
intro: Iris × pseudopumilioides, also known as the hybrid of Iris pumilio and Iris reticulata, is a perennial plant species in the family Iridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its saponin and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Iris × pseudopumilioides include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
